methodology: without_mcp tokens = sum of tiktoken-encoded length of grep output + files an agent would Read to answer the query manually against real ~/git/odoo17 source. with_mcp tokens = tiktoken-encoded length of the single MCP tool response captured live in this session. WebSearch cost in case 2 is conservatively estimated at 1800 tokens (3 result excerpts × 600 tokens), since live WebSearch can't be replayed.

steps: grep -rn 'def action_confirm' across 8 candidate sale-related addon dirs (255 tokens)
without_mcp.note: Agent must grep across 8 candidate sale-related addon directories then read the full sale_order.py from each (sale/, sale_loyalty/, sale_management/, event_sale/, sale_crm/, delivery_mondialrelay/, event_booth_sale/, l10n_it_edi_doi/) to reconstruct the override chain — and still misses anti-pattern detection.

with_mcp.note: Single MCP call returns chain + super() safety per module + 3 anti-patterns ready to render.

cases.query: Odoo 17 có sẵn module loyalty/voucher không?

steps: ls ~/git/odoo17/addons/ to scan for loyalty/voucher names (3029 tokens)
WebSearch 'Odoo 17 loyalty voucher module' — 3 result excerpts (~1800 tokens estimated)
without_mcp.note: Agent typically web-searches Odoo docs, lists addons directory, then reads 2 manifest files to confirm. WebSearch cost is estimated (live web not replayable).

with_mcp.note: Single MCP call returns indexed/edition/EE-confusion across all indexed Odoo versions instantly.

cases.query: Đổi field sale.order.amount_total ảnh hưởng đến gì?

steps: Note: agent would still miss JS patches, views in 49 modules, and transitive dependents — output still incomplete vs MCP.
without_mcp.note: Agent greps 'amount_total' across addons/sale/ (already a large output) then samples 6-7 sale_order.py files from sibling modules — and STILL misses 49 views, 124 method overrides, and 89 transitive dependent modules across the whole codebase. Output is incomplete vs MCP.

with_mcp.note: Single MCP call returns risk score + 49 views + 124 methods + 89 dependent modules in a structured tree.
